3083630.name: Psychic Enigma
3083630.description:
Unravel the secrets buried in the minds of the lost.

You are Dr. Michael Weaver—a psychologist with a reputation for venturing where others fear to tread. Using unconventional techniques, you dive headfirst into the fractured psyches of patients whose traumas have twisted their dreams into living nightmares. Here, every shadow tells a story, and every puzzle is a plea for help.

Every Mind Has Its Demons
Each chapter of Psychic Enigma is a journey into a different patient’s subconscious—a place where reality slips, memories lie, and hidden forces shape what you see. You won’t get instructions or easy answers. Instead, you’ll piece together the truth from scattered clues, cryptic notes, and the surreal logic of the dreamworld.
But the deeper you dig, the more you sense something lurking beneath the surface—a presence that connects these nightmares, whispering in the dark.

What Awaits in Chapter 1: Janet’s Dream

Janet Stone was once a dedicated teacher. Now, she’s plagued by visions she can’t escape—her childhood memories twisted into something horrifying. As you explore her dream, you’ll uncover the origins of her torment, face the demons that stalk her mind, and try to restore her peace… or at least what’s left of it.

  • Explore immersive, atmospheric dreamscapes

  • Solve intricate, story-driven puzzles woven into the environment

  • Experience psychological horror that blurs the line between sanity and madness

  • Piece together Janet’s story through environmental storytelling and hidden notes

Future Chapters: The Nightmare Continues

Janet’s case is just the beginning. Each new chapter of Psychic Enigma will bring you deeper into the minds of other patients—each one haunted by their own unique affliction, each dream more unsettling than the last. The further you go, the more you’ll uncover about the hidden force behind these nightmares… and about yourself.

Add Psychic Enigma to your wishlist, and prepare to journey through the darkest corners of the human mind.
3083630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
